description: Lava v4 targets the next architectural failure classes in the router -> context package -> semantic_ir_v1 -> deterministic admission pipeline.
validation_note: Fresh pack at creation time. If any results influence router prompts, profile contracts, mapper policy, or guidance, mark the affected cases as calibration evidence rather than held-out evidence.
design_goal: Stress truth-maintenance dependency pressure, predicate canonicalization drift, claim/fact/observation promotion, cross-segment semantics, and multilingual ontology pressure without adding Python raw-utterance language handling.

cases.utterance: Earlier we treated Harbor Permit HP-17 as active because certificate C-14 was filed. Correction: C-14 had been voided two days before filing. Is HP-17 still active?
context: Contract/compliance state intake.
Current KB may already contain condition_met(certificate_c14_filed) and active permit support.
A correction to supporting evidence should not silently leave dependent conclusions trusted.
cases.failure_mode: A changed support fact must pressure dependent active-state conclusions rather than leaving stale derived state untouched.

cases.utterance: The draft summary said Entry 8 was timely because the docket listed it as filed January 5. The clerk's corrected docket now says Entry 8 was filed January 8, after the deadline.
context: CourtListener-style docket/document intake.
A draft summary is lower authority than a corrected docket.
Timeliness derived from an old docket date should be treated as unsupported after the correction.
cases.failure_mode: A corrected source should defeat stale derived timeliness without promoting the draft summary into a finding.

cases.utterance: Mara's potassium was entered as high yesterday, but the lab just corrected the record: that specimen belonged to Mira, not Mara.
context: Bounded medical-memory profile.
Patient identity is part of the support for a lab result.
Do not infer treatment or clinical advice.
cases.failure_mode: A correction to patient identity should block/retract the old patient-specific lab state.

cases.utterance: We marked Clara as a valid codicil witness because she was listed as a neighbor. New registry page: Clara is also a beneficiary under paragraph 7.
context: Probate witness eligibility setting.
Witness validity depends on non-beneficiary status under this scenario.
A registry page is source evidence; do not decide final inheritance.
cases.failure_mode: Eligibility derived from a role must be invalidated or quarantined when a disqualifying role appears.

cases.utterance: The town record says Mira unlocked the archive because she had the brass key. Correction: the brass key was still sealed in the mayor's drawer that night.
context: Story-world detective board.
Means/opportunity conclusions depend on object possession and access facts.
Do not keep a derived access conclusion if its support is corrected away.
cases.failure_mode: Narrative causal conclusions should not survive after the supporting means fact is contradicted.

cases.utterance: Scott's dad is Ian; in the next line the note calls Ian his father and later says Ian is Scott's parent.
context: Family relationship notes inside a story-world memory lane.
Use the canonical predicate when several surface forms describe the same relation.
cases.failure_mode: Equivalent natural-language relation names should not spawn a predicate family.

cases.utterance: The borrower shall pay, must remit, and is obligated to transfer the same quarterly fee by March 31.
context: Contract obligation intake.
Three surface verbs describe one obligation, not three unrelated predicates.
cases.failure_mode: Deontic paraphrases should canonicalize to obligation/3 and must not become completed payment facts.

cases.utterance: In Rao v. Kline, the opinion calls Rao the plaintiff, the claimant, and later the appellant; Kline is the defendant-appellee.
context: Legal source metadata extraction.
Party roles must be scoped to the case; role aliases should not become global unary predicates.
cases.failure_mode: Legal role labels must stay case-scoped instead of drifting into global predicates.

cases.utterance: Priya's blood sugar, serum glucose, and glucose lab all refer to the same repeated test; it came back high.
context: Bounded medical-memory profile.
Use one normalized lab-test concept rather than separate facts for every synonym.
Named patient is explicit; no clinical advice.
cases.failure_mode: Medical synonym surfaces should normalize to a single test concept within the bounded profile.

cases.utterance: The note calls the same paper Elias's amendment, his codicil, and the June change to the will; Clara says she saw it signed.
context: Probate document-intake setting.
Document aliases should be represented as candidate identity or document state, not three different durable documents without evidence.
cases.failure_mode: Alias-rich document language should not explode into separate objects or valid witness conclusions.

cases.utterance: Jonas says Mira entered at 8:10, but the lobby video only shows a person in Mira's coat entering at 8:12.
context: Legal/evidence intake.
Witness testimony is a claim; video is an observation with identity uncertainty.
cases.failure_mode: Claim plus visual observation should preserve source and identity uncertainty.

cases.utterance: The complaint alleged Acme missed the April rent. Later, both parties stipulated in open court that Acme missed the April rent.
context: Legal claim/finding/stipulation boundary.
A complaint allegation alone is not a finding; a later stipulation can become stronger admitted source evidence.
cases.failure_mode: The system must represent epistemic promotion without pretending a pleading was a court finding.

cases.utterance: Omar says penicillin makes him dizzy, but the nurse observed hives after the injection today.
context: Bounded medical memory.
Patient-reported intolerance and observed allergic-type reaction are different sources.
Do not recommend treatment.
cases.failure_mode: Different source types should not collapse into one undifferentiated allergy fact.

cases.utterance: The majority cites Hale v. Port only to distinguish it; the dissent says Hale controls.
context: Court opinion citation intake.
Citation is not endorsement, and dissent statements are not majority holdings.
cases.failure_mode: Source role and rhetorical use determine whether a citation supports a legal proposition.

cases.utterance: The supplier must deliver widgets by May 1. The report does not say whether delivery happened.
context: Contract obligation intake.
Obligation and breach/compliance event are separate epistemic states.
cases.failure_mode: Future obligation language must not become an event or breach fact.

cases.utterance: Record this policy: no requester may approve their own reimbursement. Did February violate that? Also correction: reimbursement R2 was approved by Lena, not by Omar.
context: Mixed policy/rule/query/correction turn.
Queries should not be swallowed into write facts.
The correction after the query must still be processed in order.
cases.failure_mode: The segmenter/router must preserve rule setup, query, and later correction as distinct operations.

cases.utterance: Before Nia hid the ledger, Mara copied page 4. After the copy, the clerk sealed the original. Who could have read page 4 before sealing?
context: Story-world investigation.
Temporal order matters across event clauses and the final query.
cases.failure_mode: Temporal clauses must not be flattened into unordered facts when a query depends on order.

cases.utterance: The complaint says the lock failed on March 2. The maintenance log says it failed on March 5. Which date should the KB trust, if any?
context: Legal/source-provenance setting.
A complaint allegation and maintenance log are different source classes.
The final sentence is a query about trust, not a new fact.
cases.failure_mode: Conflicting source statements plus a trust query should produce provenance pressure, not a chosen fact.

cases.utterance: Priya repeated serum creatinine this afternoon. Is that dangerous? For the record, her glucose was high yesterday.
context: Bounded medical memory.
Clinical advice question should be rejected or separated; safe memory fact may still be processed if policy allows mixed outcome.
cases.failure_mode: Advice query boundaries must not poison safe bounded memory ingestion.

cases.utterance: The charter says verbal amendments require two non-beneficiary witnesses. Does Arthur's workshop story satisfy that? Beatrice now says Silas was present too.
context: Probate rule/fact/query turn.
The new witness claim after the query should not retroactively answer without source handling.
cases.failure_mode: A post-query claim should remain a claim, not a retroactive fact that completes the rule.

cases.utterance: A Lucia le salió alta la creatinina, pero el informe dice que la muestra era de Lucio, no de Lucia.
context: Spanish medical-memory turn.
Dative/existential phrasing describes a lab result assigned to a patient.
The sample identity correction is the main safety issue.
cases.failure_mode: Spanish result-assignment grammar should normalize medical meaning while preserving patient-identity correction.

cases.utterance: 田中氏は契約違反だと原告が主張したが、裁判所は時効だけを判断した。
context: Japanese legal-source turn.
Plaintiff allegation and court judgment are distinct.
Topic marking should not make the allegation into a finding.
cases.failure_mode: Japanese topic/subject ambiguity should not collapse an allegation into a court finding.

cases.utterance: У Ивана был ключ от архива, но ключ лежал у Марии в ящике до полуночи.
context: Story-world access evidence.
Russian possession/existence structures can imply custody, location, or access pressure.
Conflicting possession/location should be represented cautiously.
cases.failure_mode: Russian possession grammar should not overcommit access when a location clause points elsewhere.

cases.utterance: Le fournisseur doit livrer avant le 1er mai, sauf si le port est fermé par ordre officiel.
context: French contract obligation with exception.
The exception is a condition, not an observed closed-port event.
cases.failure_mode: French deontic/exception structure should preserve obligation plus conditional exception without asserting the exception happened.

cases.utterance: Beatrice dice que vivía en London, Ontario, pas au Royaume-Uni; Arthur insiste she was out of country five years.
context: Probate residence/forfeiture setting.
London is location-ambiguous across languages.
A party accusation is not residence proof.
cases.failure_mode: Code-switched place identity should not trigger forfeiture from an ambiguous London reference.
